title: Unbreakable Anvil
description:
Are you tired of wasting your iron on replacing your anvil?

Do you wish you could use them as much as you want without worrying about them breaking?

Then this mod is for you!

This mod prevents the anvil from breaking on use
body:
# Unbreakable Anvils

## Stop wasting iron and keep playing

Are you tired of replacing anvils again and again?

You finally craft one, use it a few times, and then:

> *“The anvil is slightly damaged.”*  
> *“The anvil is very damaged.”*  
> **It breaks.**

It is frustrating and expensive.

**This mod prevents anvils from breaking when they are used.**

You can:

- repair tools and armor  
- rename items  
- combine enchantments  
- experiment freely without losing resources  

Enjoy the game without worrying about whether your anvil will survive the next use.

---

## Multiplayer and Single Player Support

### ✔ Single Player
Install on the **client** and play normally. Everything works as expected.

### ✔ Multiplayer
Install the mod on the **server**.  
Clients do not need to install it.

---

## Who is this mod for?

This mod is especially helpful for:

- new players learning the game  
- younger players who do not have many resources  
- builders who rename items frequently  
- survival players who prefer fewer resource sinks  

It lets you focus on exploring, building, and having fun.

---

## Compatibility

- works with most other mods  
- requires no additional dependencies  
- install and play

Just place the mod in your mods folder (or server mods folder) and start your world.

---

> 💡 **Feature Requests and Version Support**
>
> If you would like new options or support for another Minecraft version,  
> please open an issue on the project page and let me know.
